notes: Small Daily Reflections meditation/discussion meeting, using the directions given on pp. 86-88 of Alcoholics Anonymous. Meets ON THE BEACH SAND in a hidden alcove about 25 ft. NW of the Kamaʻole Beach 3 lifeguard tower, at GPS coordinates (20.7131, -156.4463) or Google Maps Plus Code PH73+6FP. notes: Small Daily Reflections meditation/discussion meeting, using the directions given on pp. 86-88 of Alcoholics Anonymous. Meets ON THE BEACH SAND in a hidden alcove about 25 ft. NW of the Kamaʻole Beach 3 lifeguard tower, at GPS coordinates (20.7131, -156.4463) or Google Maps Plus Code PH73+6FP. Concealed location cannot be seen from elsewhere on the beach, nor from the grassy park above. Look for the blue-and-white circle-and-triangle disk hanging from the bushes. No smoking/vaping/pets. Beach chairs recommended. Rain cancels. Conditions occasionally force relocation elsewhere on the beach or to picnic tables near the lifeguard stand in the park area above the beach proper.
